subject: Re: INTEGRATIVE NEUROSCIENCE INITIATIVE
body:
I want to see him when I return


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, February 12, 2008 12:34:49 PM
Subject: FW: INTEGRATIVE NEUROSCIENCE INITIATIVE


 
 
From: egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, February 12, 2008 1:19 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: INTEGRATIVE NEUROSCIENCE INITIATIVE
 
 
Dear Ms. Groff,
 
Pursuant to our telephone conversation a few weeks ago, thank you for taking the time to look at the attached outline. I will welcome an opportunity to speak with Mr. Epstein personally to explain our objectives in more detail and to discuss several ways in which foundations and individual benefactors may be in a position to help us. Please let me know if and how this can be arranged.

With best wishes,

EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 765 7158
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com











More new features than ever. Check out the new AOL Mail!
